name: AREthRemoveField
title: AREthRemoveField
description: This function removes a field from a Provided Service Instance.

The notification callback registered with AREthAddField is no longer called after this function is called. The field notification is no longer sent by the AUTOSAR Eth IL, and the AUTOSAR Eth IL will no longer respond to Field Setter and Field Getter methods.

parameters.name: pfHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the field that was created by AREthAddField.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
